data.title: Metal Seals Market to Reach $3.1 billion, Globally, by 2034 at 4.7% CAGR: Allied Market Research
data.description: Metal seals are advanced sealing components crafted for high precision, capable of maintaining a leak-free performance in extreme industrial conditions. These seals can withstand varying pressures, temperatures, cryogenic settings, vacuums, and corrosive substances where traditional elastomers may fail. The innovation, developed in Wilmington, boasts impressive durability and reliability to ensure optimal performance in challenging environments.

data.title: Halo Effect of GLP-1s Signals New Consumer Lifestyle and Health and Wellness Trends
data.description: Recent research conducted by the Acosta Group in Jacksonville, Florida on April 14, 2026, highlights the influence of Generation Z and Millennials on the Consumer Packaged Goods (CPG) industry. The study shows that GLP-1s are playing a significant role in reshaping consumer behavior, particularly among the younger demographic. This trend is crucial for CPG brands, retailers, and restaurants as they seek to innovate and adapt to changing consumer preferences. The data indicates a shift in the market, emphasizing the importance of understanding and responding to the needs and preferences of the younger generations.

data.title: NFP Acquires The Hamilton Group, LLC, Expanding P&C Capabilities in U.S. Northeast Region
data.description: NFP, a prominent property and casualty broker and benefits consultant, has revealed the acquisition of The Hamilton Group, LLC, a leading risk management solutions provider for businesses in the tristate area. This move enhances NFP's services in the region while expanding its expertise in risk management. The acquisition underscores NFP's strategic growth initiatives and commitment to offering comprehensive solutions to its clients. The Hamilton Group's extensive experience and client portfolio will significantly boost NFP's capabilities, further solidifying its position in the market.

data.title: Zaheer Ebtikar Joins Plasma as Chief Strategy Officer, Strengthening Leadership Ahead of Plasma One Launch
data.description: In London, Plasma, the company responsible for the first neobank designed for stablecoins and the supporting infrastructure, has recently named Zaheer Ebtikar as its Chief Strategy Officer. This appointment underscores Plasma's dedication to making stablecoins accessible for global everyday transactions. The company is launching its stablecoin-focused neobank, Plasma One, to kickstart this initiative. With over eight years of experience in the crypto industry, Ebtikar offers a wealth of knowledge having worked extensively within crypto markets and possessing a strong understanding of macroeconomics.

data.title: Clutch Report: 69% of Users Now Use Google Less as AI Reshapes Business Discovery
data.description: A recent study by Clutch revealed that 69% of users of AI assistants are using Google less frequently than before, with 32% now turning to AI as their initial source of information, surpassing the 28% who still opt for Google first. This shift signifies AI's increasing prominence in research processes. Failure by businesses to appear in AI-generated results poses the risk of being disregarded by customers early in their decision-making process. Currently, AI is involved in all research stages, with the leading use being information search (55%), and receiving recommendations.
